shot_type_and_framing: close-up of a rectangular serving tray held horizontally, with a hand picking almonds on the right side of the frame, background softly showing a seated middle-aged man and woman centrally placed
camera_movement: slow push-in towards the tray and hand
lens_and_cinematic_look: full-frame feel, 50mm focal length style, shallow depth of field with soft bokeh background
environment_description: indoor setting featuring warm, ambient lighting, decorated with marigold flower garlands and traditional brass lamp in the background, soft beige tones, and cozy furniture
subject_description: a rectangular white marble tray with a golden decorative line, holding four round sweet balls, green cardamom pods clustered beside them, and a group of almonds with one almond being picked by a hand
motion_behavior: natural, smooth movement of the hand picking almonds with subtle natural hand motion, no abrupt or exaggerated gestures
overall_cinematic_tone: grounded, realistic, premium, warm and inviting filmic atmosphere
